summary: Iteration 35 - ClienteWizard Questionnaire Restructuring Testing Complete. All 11 features tested and PASSED. The questionnaire now has 4 colored blocks (Posizionamento, Maturità, Validazione, Obiettivo) with 6 structured questions, radio buttons with visual feedback, and proper JSON output for AI pipeline.
critical_code_review_comments: QUIZ_FIELDS STRUCTURE VERIFIED: 6 questions in 4 blocks with ai_tag for structured JSON output
BLOCCHI_META COLORS VERIFIED: Posizionamento=#3B82F6 (blue), Maturità=#8B5CF6 (purple), Validazione=#10B981 (green), Obiettivo=#F59E0B (amber)
TEXTAREA FIELDS VERIFIED: 3 textareas with rich placeholders (expertise, target, problema_risolto)
RADIO BUTTONS VERIFIED: 2 questions with 4 options each (vendita_online, audience_size), 1 question with 5 options (obiettivo)
VISUAL FEEDBACK VERIFIED: Selected radio shows yellow border (#FFD24D) and light yellow background
ALTRO OPTION VERIFIED: When 'Altro (specificare)' is selected, additional textarea appears for custom input
CONTINUA BUTTON VERIFIED: Disabled until all fields are filled, enabled when form is complete
INDIETRO BUTTON VERIFIED: Returns to Step 1 Welcome
BACKEND ENDPOINT VERIFIED: POST /api/cliente-analisi/mini-quiz accepts structured JSON with domanda, risposta, tipo, blocco, label fields
STATE UPDATE VERIFIED: After quiz submission, stato_cliente is updated to QUESTIONARIO_COMPLETATO
context_for_next_testing_agent: ClienteWizard questionnaire restructuring is complete. Step 2 shows 4 colored blocks with 6 questions. Radio buttons have yellow visual feedback when selected. 'Altro' option in Obiettivo block shows additional textarea. Backend saves structured JSON with ai_tag keys (core_expertise, target_audience, digital_maturity, audience_size, value_proposition, project_goal).

feature_1_4_blocks_visible.details: Step 2 shows 4 colored blocks: POSIZIONAMENTO (blue #3B82F6), MATURITÀ (purple #8B5CF6), VALIDAZIONE (green #10B981), OBIETTIVO (amber #F59E0B)

feature_2_posizionamento_textareas.details: Blocco Posizionamento has 2 textareas with rich placeholders for expertise and target audience

feature_3_maturita_radios.details: Blocco Maturità has 2 radio questions with 4 options each (vendita_online, audience_size)

feature_4_validazione_textarea.details: Blocco Validazione has 1 textarea for problema_risolto with placeholder

feature_5_obiettivo_radio.details: Blocco Obiettivo has 1 radio with 5 options including 'Altro (specificare)' with optional text field

feature_6_radio_visual_feedback.details: Selected radio shows yellow border (rgb(255, 210, 77)) and light yellow background

feature_7_continua_disabled.details: Continua button is disabled until all fields are filled, then becomes enabled

feature_8_indietro_button.details: Indietro button returns to Step 1 Welcome

feature_9_form_scrollable.details: Form is scrollable - all 4 blocks are visible when scrolling

feature_10_backend_structured_json.details: POST /api/cliente-analisi/mini-quiz accepts and saves structured JSON with fields: domanda, risposta, tipo, blocco, label (for radio), altro_testo (for 'altro' option)

feature_11_stato_update.details: After quiz submission, stato_cliente is updated to QUESTIONARIO_COMPLETATO

mocked_apis.canva_api: MOCKED - Canva API integration is mocked
mocked_apis.kling_ai_api: MOCKED - Kling AI API integration is mocked
